CustomField.formula: IF( AND( TEXT(POC_Type__c) <> "Virtual Lab", Agreed_to_POC_terms__c = FALSE, Online_Agreement_Signed__c = FALSE, OR(ISBLANK(TEXT(Partner_Disty_Signed_POC_Addendum__c)), TEXT(Partner_Disty_Signed_POC_Addendum__c) = 'No'), Manual_POC_Agreement__c = FALSE), IMAGE("/img/msg_icons/error16.png", "red", 15, 15) + " Unable to submit this POC Request. The following agreements are required:"+ IF(Agreed_to_POC_terms__c = FALSE,' Agreed to POC terms ','') + IF(Online_Agreement_Signed__c = FALSE,', Online Agreement Signed ','') + IF(OR(ISBLANK(TEXT(Partner_Disty_Signed_POC_Addendum__c)) , TEXT(Partner_Disty_Signed_POC_Addendum__c) = 'No'),', Partner/Disty Signed POC Addendum ','')+ IF(Manual_POC_Agreement__c = FALSE,', Manual POC Agreement ',''), IMAGE("/img/msg_icons/confirm16.png", "green", 15, 15) )
CustomField.label: Warnings
